name: Easy Apple Cranberry Pie
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces Can of Whole Berry Cranberries
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pie crust according to package directions for a two-crust pie.
2. In a large bowl, combine all filling ingredients; mix lightly.
3. Spoon the mixture into the crust-lined pan.
4. Place the second crust on top and seal the edges and flute.
5. Cut slits in the top crust.
6. Bake at 425 degrees for 40-50 minutes or until the crust is golden brown and apples are tender.
7. Cover the edge of the crust with strips of foil after 20 minutes of baking to prevent excessive browning.
